data.title: 10-year Treasury yield falls to 4% as DXY softens — Is it time to buy the Bitcoin price dip?
data.description:
On April 3, yields on long-term US government debt fell to their lowest levels in six months as investors reacted to growing concerns over the global trade war and the weakening of the US dollar. The yield on the 10-year Treasury note briefly touched 4. 0%, down from 4. 4% a week earlier, signaling strong demand from buyers
source: https://cointelegraph.com/news/10-year-treasury-yield-falls-to-4-as-dxy-softens-is-it-time-to-buy-the-bitcoin-price-dip?utm_source=rss_feed&utm_medium=rss&utm_campaign=rss_partner_inbound

data.title: Crypto traders say they’ve ‘started smoking’ to cope with Trump’s tariffs
data.description:
Telegram poll links Trump’s tariffs to smoking surge as crypto traders cope with market meltdown through humor and haze.
source: https://www.thestreet.com/crypto/markets/crypto-traders-say-theyve-started-smoking-to-cope-with-trumps-tariffs

data.title: AVAX, SUI Neck And Neck Amid Volatile Market Conditions
data.description:
Panic prevailed in the crypto market today, soon after what looked like a path to recovery as April ushered in the second quarter of the year. Some altcoins, including Avalanche (AVAX) and Sui (SUI), experienced price rebounds the previous day. However, a considerable dip was observed today
source: https://www.thecoinrepublic.com/2025/04/03/avax-sui-neck-and-neck-amid-volatile-market-conditions/

data.title: Hong Kong investigates trust companies amid Justin Sun’s claims against First Digital Trust
data.description:
Johnny Jiezhuang Wu, chairman of the Hong Kong Legislative Council Web3 and Digital Assets subcommittee, has announced that legislators are investigating allegations against stablecoin issuer First Digital Trust. In a post on X, Wu said regulators and lawmakers will take action on the issue. Wu’s comments followed claims by Tron network founder Justin Sun that […]
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/hong-kong-investigates-trust-companies-amid-justin-suns-claims-against-first-digital-trust/

data.title: Missing from Trump’s tariffs list, Russia imported $22 billion of goods into US since 2022
data.description:
Years of increasingly severe sanctions may have made its inclusion in Donald Trump’s tariffs list unnecessary, but Russia has nevertheless managed to import goods for $22 billion into the United States since 2022, the year when it launched its war against Ukraine. Trade between the two superpowers has been going down a steep slope over […]
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/missing-from-trumps-tariffs-list-russia-imported-22-billion-of-goods-into-us-since-2022/

data.title: Shardeum Testnet Blazes a Trail with Record-Breaking Validator Participation
data.description:
Shardeum, the ambitious Layer 1 blockchain focused on autoscaling without sacrificing decentralization, has concluded its testnet phase with a resounding success, setting a new benchmark amongst upcoming L1s. Our analysis reveals that Shardeum’s testnet has not only demonstrated impressive technical capabilities but has also garnered significant community support, positioning it as a highly anticipated network […]
source: https://droomdroom.com/shardeum-testnet-blazes-a-trail-with-record-breaking-validator-participation/

data.title: Alleged Tech Spy Says He Was Paid in Ethereum to Snoop for Rival Firm
data.description:
A former employee of Rippling has alleged he accepted $5,000 in ETH per month to spy on his employer on behalf of its competitor, Deel.
source: https://decrypt.co/313202/alleged-tech-spy-says-paid-in-ethereum-to-snoop-for-rival

data.title: Matcha DEX Aggregator Launches on Solana
data.description:
The 0x-built platform now supports trades on both SVM and EVM-compatible blockchains.
source: https://www.bankless.com/read/matcha-dex-aggregator-launches-on-solana

data.title: $400B in tariff revenue could help U.S. stack Bitcoin, says Investment Guru
data.description:
Investment guru Alexander Blume thinks that the U. S. government’s potential purchase of Bitcoin could easily lead to an appreciation in its value by 15-20%.
source: https://www.thestreet.com/crypto/markets/400b-in-tariff-revenue-could-help-u-s-stack-bitcoin-says-investment-guru

data.title: VanEck files first U.S. BNB ETF—Unlocking regulated crypto exposure
data.description:
VanEck filed for a BNB ETF in the U. S. which could increase exposure to the token and its products.
source: https://ambcrypto.com/vaneck-files-first-u-s-bnb-etf-unlocking-regulated-crypto-exposure/
